product: CATVERSE Twin-Ledger Enterprise Finance OS — AOXPET Base Lab

entries.label: Base Dashboard App
entries.boundary: The existing App ID and Builder Code were retained; the Enterprise OS Render domain is verified as primary and BaseProofPay remains secondary.

entries.label: Builder Code / ERC-8021
entries.boundary: Official checker and calldata prove attribution transport; Base.dev indexing is a separate asynchronous result.

entries.label: Verified Base contracts
entries.boundary: These contracts support the Treasury/Payment component, not the entire fourteen-domain Enterprise OS.

entries.label: Production x402
entries.value: Base Mainnet seller, replay controls and Builder extension
entries.boundary: Completed self-controlled canaries prove technical usage, not independent adoption.

entries.label: Talent project
entries.boundary: Talent does not expose the counted hashes; the aggregate cannot prove which transactions were indexed or independent adoption.

entries.label: Base.dev attribution
entries.value: Public ranking snapshot predates the latest evidence
entries.boundary: Indexing delay never authorizes a replacement transaction or repeated payment.

entries.label: Base builders discovery
entries.value: Nomination package handed to the dedicated X publishing session
entries.boundary: The public reply is not yet submitted. No list membership, application acceptance or official endorsement is claimed.

entries.label: Independent adoption
entries.value: One genuinely independent voluntary user remains required
entries.boundary: Self-controlled wallets, synthetic ERP records and platform aggregates cannot satisfy this gate.
